text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship begins, and the
atmosphere is buzzing with excitement!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll be running it with Daitaku Helios, Ikuno
Dictus, and Nice Nature.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and Zephyr is running too! This race is gonna
be, um... super lit! ♪
